itemdesc-fieldcamera: A heavy wooden box used to capture moments in time on glass plates.
itemdesc-fieldcamera-loaded-silvered: A field camera loaded with a sensitized plate.
itemdesc-fieldcamera-loaded-exposed: A field camera loaded with an exposed plate.
blockdesc-platebox: Stores and protects prepared plates. Use <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> on slots with a plate to store. <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> on a stored plate to retrieve it.
blockdesc-framedphotographwall: A wall-mounted oak frame for displaying photographs. Hold a finished photo plate and <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> to insert; <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> with empty hand to remove.
blockdesc-framedphotographground: A free-standing easel frame for displaying photographs. Hold a finished photo plate and <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> to insert; <icon>rightmousebutton</icon> with empty hand to remove.
itemdesc-drycollodionmix: A dry mix that can be sealed with water in a barrel to make collodion.
itemdesc-collodionportion: A syrupy chemical used to coat plates.
itemdesc-silversolutionportion: A sensitizing solution for collodion-coated plates.
itemdesc-developerportion: Begins to reveal the latent image on an exposed plate.
itemdesc-fixerportion: Stabilizes a developed plate so it can be handled in light.
photocore:heldhelp-plate-sensitize-dry: Pick up to speed up drying
photocore:heldhelp-plate-drying-wait: Drying… leave the plate to finish
itemdesc-framedphotograph: A photograph mounted in a simple wooden frame.
blockdesc-developmenttray-blue: A shallow tray for developing and fixing wet plates.
blockdesc-developmenttray-red: A shallow tray for developing and fixing wet plates.
blockdesc-developmenttray-fire: A shallow tray for developing and fixing wet plates.
itemdesc-developmenttray-raw-blue: A clay tray that must be fired before use.
itemdesc-developmenttray-raw-red: A clay tray that must be fired before use.
itemdesc-developmenttray-raw-fire: A clay tray that must be fired before use.
photocore:camera-info-controls: RMB to look through the viewfinder. LMB to start/pause exposure.
photocore:camera-info-tripod: Shift+RMB with a tripod in offhand mounts it; Shift+RMB with empty offhand removes it after unloading the plate.
photocore:camera-info-load-hint: Shift+Right click with a Sensitized Plate in offhand to load.
photocore:camera-info-unload-hint: Shift+Right click with empty offhand to unload.
photocore:shuttergate-maxframes-message: photocore: this plate cannot be exposed any further (maximum {0} frames reached).
photocore:shuttergate-target-message: photocore: this exposure has reached its target and can't be resumed.
photocore:msg-exposure-save-failed: photocore: could not save exposure data to disk — partial exposures may not persist across sessions.
photocore:msg-exposure-already-active: photocore: another exposure is already in progress.
photocore:msg-plate-max-frames: photocore: this plate cannot be exposed any further.
photocore:msg-load-sensitized-plate: photocore: load a sensitized plate to take a photo.
photocore:msg-plate-not-exposable: photocore: only fresh or paused exposure plates can be exposed.
photocore:msg-plate-dried-no-expose: photocore: this plate has dried out and can no longer be exposed.
photocore:msg-plate-other-photographer: photocore: this plate belongs to another photographer.
photocore:msg-tip-f4-guiless: photocore: Tip - press F4 to toggle gui-less mode (hide HUD) while using the viewfinder.
photocore:msg-mounted-other-active: photocore: someone else's exposure is in progress.
photocore:msg-mounted-pause-first: photocore: pause the exposure first (RMB) before unloading.
photocore:msg-mounted-other-paused: photocore: someone else's paused exposure — Shift+RMB to unload the plate, or Shift+Ctrl+RMB to recover the camera.
photocore:msg-mounted-load-hint: photocore: hold a sensitized plate and right-click to load.
photocore:msg-plate-dried-reclaim: photocore: this plate has dried out — wash it in a development tray to reclaim the glass.
photocore:msg-tray-plate-dried: photocore: the plate has dried and can no longer be used.
photocore:msg-tray-other-photographer: photocore: only the original photographer can develop this plate.
photocore:msg-develop-not-whitelisted: photocore: you aren't on this server's develop whitelist — you can expose plates, but only whitelisted players can develop them. Your exposure has been kept.
